warnings: This index is an MET observation. Decisions about folding or removing artifacts belong to canonical owners and are tracked here as recommendations only.
downstream_consumers entries describe artifact-backed reads observed in the dashboard API/page; consumer fan-out outside this repo is not enumerated.
failure_prevented: A new engineer being unable to answer 'what reads this artifact, what API field it surfaces, which dashboard panel renders it, and what failure it prevents' in under 15 minutes; folded/removable items hiding because no MET artifact tracks them.
signal_improved: Each MET artifact has a named upstream/downstream map, debug_question_answered coverage, and a keep/fold/remove recommendation tied to failure_prevented and signal_improved.

artifact_dependencies.failure_prevented: Bottleneck staying invisible during promotion review.
artifact_dependencies.signal_improved: Dominant bottleneck system and constrained loop leg are explicit with confidence rationale.
artifact_dependencies.rationale: Bottleneck artifact remains the single named handle for constrained-leg observation; no overlap with other MET artifacts.

artifact_dependencies.failure_prevented: High-leverage items competing with low-leverage items without a sourced ranking.
artifact_dependencies.signal_improved: Leverage items surface with leverage_score, source_artifacts_used, systems_affected.
artifact_dependencies.rationale: Leverage queue is the only MET artifact ranking items by failure_prevented + signal_improved.

artifact_dependencies.failure_prevented: Risk posture being inferred from disparate seed artifacts with no single record.
artifact_dependencies.signal_improved: Top risks, fallback signal counts, and proof_chain_coverage are summarized in one place.
artifact_dependencies.rationale: Risk summary backs the trust-pulse panel and risk-card listings; not duplicated elsewhere.

artifact_dependencies.failure_prevented: Failures and near misses being unobserved into the next loop.
artifact_dependencies.signal_improved: Each failure/near miss is linked to a feedback item with explicit affected_systems.
artifact_dependencies.rationale: Source-of-truth for the feedback ledger consumed by the learning loop snapshot and closure ledger.

artifact_dependencies.failure_prevented: Eval coverage gaps remaining unowned with no candidate ever proposed.
artifact_dependencies.signal_improved: Each gap has an eval candidate with input artifacts, owner_recommendation=EVL.
artifact_dependencies.rationale: Primary EVL handoff record; closure ledger references the same candidate IDs.

artifact_dependencies.failure_prevented: Policy gaps remaining without a named candidate signal addressed to the owner system.
artifact_dependencies.signal_improved: Each policy gap has a signal with suggested_owner_system and required_evidence_before_adoption.
artifact_dependencies.rationale: Primary canonical-owner handoff record for proposed policy signals.

artifact_dependencies.failure_prevented: Loop status read from disparate artifacts without a single rollup.
artifact_dependencies.signal_improved: Single snapshot exposes counts, themes, and next recommended improvement inputs.
artifact_dependencies.rationale: Rollup is the operator's first-stop overview; closure ledger complements but does not replace it.

artifact_dependencies.failure_prevented: Operators needing >15 minutes to answer what failed/why/where/source/next.
artifact_dependencies.signal_improved: Per-failure packet with what_failed, why_it_matters, evidence, next_recommended_input.
artifact_dependencies.rationale: Direct precursor to the MET-25 debug explanation index; complementary, not redundant.

artifact_dependencies.failure_prevented: Override count being silently reported as 0 with no audit log.
artifact_dependencies.signal_improved: Override count is unknown until canonical log exists; reason_codes name the gap.
artifact_dependencies.rationale: MET-24 override_evidence_intake_record absorbs the same intake shape with a richer evidence_status field; once MET-24 lands and dashboards read it, this record is a fold candidate. For now keep — closure ledger and dashboard wiring still reference it.

artifact_dependencies.failure_prevented: Eval candidate handoff to EVL remaining implicit with no required-authority-input list.
artifact_dependencies.signal_improved: Materialization path is proposed only; required_authority_inputs and required_tests are explicit.
artifact_dependencies.rationale: MET-23 evl_handoff_observation_tracker subsumes per-candidate handoff observations. Once MET-23 lands and dashboards read it, this record is a fold candidate. Keep for now to preserve the existing EVL-handoff history.

artifact_dependencies.failure_prevented: Causality gaps slipping through with no record naming missing dimensions/edges.
artifact_dependencies.signal_improved: Per-dimension replay status and per-edge lineage status are explicit.
artifact_dependencies.rationale: Only MET artifact tracking REP/LIN per-dimension/edge gaps; no duplication.

artifact_dependencies.failure_prevented: Stub fallback rows continuing to be reported as artifact-backed.
artifact_dependencies.signal_improved: High-leverage rows have replacement_signal_needed and priority.
artifact_dependencies.rationale: Single registry for high-leverage fallback rows; closure ledger references rows here.

artifact_dependencies.failure_prevented: Observe-only enforcement posture being read as passivity rather than the artifact-backed observation it is.
artifact_dependencies.signal_improved: SEL has a named compliance signal input proposing a first-class compliance_posture field.
artifact_dependencies.rationale: Single SEL-targeted compliance signal input record.

artifact_dependencies.failure_prevented: Candidates accumulating as a stale suggestion pile no canonical owner ever closed.
artifact_dependencies.signal_improved: Each candidate has age_days, stale_after_days, current_state, and next_recommended_input.
artifact_dependencies.rationale: New MET-19 closure tracker; only artifact carrying age and stale_after across candidate types.
